name: Sonic Tracker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>音速を追う者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ソニックトラッカー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: The One Who Pursues the Speed of Sound
desc: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Transonic Bird". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 4 or more. The Level of the monster Special Summoned by this effect becomes the total Levels of monsters used for its Ritual Summon. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Ritual Monster you control; send 1 Ritual Monster with the same Type or Attribute from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Sonic Tracker" once per turn.
eff: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Transonic Bird". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 4 or more. The Level of the monster Special Summoned by this effect becomes the total Levels of monsters used for its Ritual Summon. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Ritual Monster you control; send 1 Ritual Monster with the same Type or Attribute from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Sonic Tracker" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
